best_unix_strategy: Use awk with state tracking to: 1) Identify when entering ## Features and ## Security top-level sections, 2) Detect ### Authentication under Features and buffer all lines until next ## or ### heading, 3) Skip printing the buffered auth content in original location, 4) After printing ### TLS under Security, insert the buffered auth content, 5) Continue printing remaining lines normally
rationale: This task requires understanding markdown heading hierarchy to determine section boundaries - knowing when a ### section ends (at the next ## or ### heading). Line-based sed/awk tools struggle with this because they process sequentially without inherent tree structure awareness, making it difficult to reliably track nested section boundaries and reconstruct the document with correct hierarchy.
